content:
<@364412673275723779> hi Jynn, hi all, we adjusted Tulu's awakener story and here's an example; it will go live next version.
Any feedback? Please let us know!

hi hi, pardon if i come off a bit blunt right now 

I think this is an improvement especially in the grammatical errors, but it feels like there's a little bit off about it still... I don't want to declare anything since I don't understand the original CN text fully, but I suppose it can just be passed off as creative liberties <:karen_nervous:1408324291237511259> 

向着未知的海洋 - couldn't this be translated instead as "setting sail for uncharted waters" since it does mention 海洋 again, that being omitted makes the "vast dark ocean" imagery feel incomplete.
I'll um, follow up on the rest of the text maybe tomorrow since it's quite late for me but could i also selfishly ask for the ones that refer to tulu specifically
